name: Country of Counterparty 2
description: This data element reports the two-character ISO 3166 country code of Counterparty 2.
format: Two-character ISO 3166 country code (two uppercase alphabetic characters)
optionalityRules: Conditionally required if Counterparty 2 is not reported as an LEI (for Action types: NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI)
Not reported for Action types: TERM, EROR, PRTO
valueRules: If Counterparty 2 is reported as ANON, reporting entities should report their own country of residence or business address.
If Counterparty 2 identifier type indicator is reported as True (i.e., Counterparty 2 is an LEI), no value is reported.
